summary.intent: Display the actual error message when a model probe fails, instead of just showing 'Unsupported' as the badge status.
summary.outcome: Updated page-providers.js to show the error message below the model ID rather than only displaying it in a tooltip, then committed and pushed to the remote branch `succinct-pyroraptor`.

repo: Model probe failures (e.g. permission errors) are captured and stored, but were only surfaced as a tooltip via the `title` attribute on the 'Unsupported' badge — not visible in the main UI.
The moltis web frontend is a Rust workspace with JS assets under crates/web/src/assets/js/.

code.finding: Model probe error messages were stored (accessible as tooltip text) but not rendered inline. The fix added the error message as visible text below the model ID.

workflow: JS linting was run after editing before committing, suggesting a lint step is part of the standard pre-commit workflow for this project.

friction: The error message was silently hidden in a tooltip, making it non-obvious that failure details were available — required reading the source to discover.
